data.title: Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (NYSE: HP) to host conference call on Feb 5, 2026, at 11am ET to discuss fiscal Q1 results. CEO, President, and CFO to lead.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, Helmerich & Payne, Inc. (NYSE: HP) is set to hold a conference call on February 5, 2026, at 11 a.m. Eastern Time to review its fiscal first quarter 2026 performance. The call will be led by CEO John Lindsay, President Trey Adams, and Senior Vice President/CFO Kevin Vann. Details for accessing the earnings release and presentation are accessible on hpinc.com. Investors have the option to participate in the call via phone or audio webcast. This event focuses on Helmerich & Payne, Inc.’s Fiscal First Quarter 2026.

data.title: Hess Midstream LP plans conference call for earnings release. Stay tuned for more details.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global carbon emissions have reached a record high of approximately 36.4 billion metric tons in 2021, marking a significant increase compared to previous years. The data also indicates that China is the largest emitter, accounting for around 30% of the total emissions, followed by the United States with 14% and the European Union with 10%. This concerning trend highlights the pressing need for more substantial efforts to reduce carbon emissions worldwide in order to combat climate change effectively.

data.title: EnerSys (NYSE: ENS) to release Q3 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 4, 2026 for period ended Dec 28, 2025. Conference call scheduled.
data.description: EnerSys, a prominent figure in stored energy solutions for industrial use, disclosed its plan to reveal its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 on February 4, 2026. The data covers the period up to December 28, 2025, and is set to be released post-market closing. Interested parties can access the press release and presentation slides on EnerSys' website under the Investor Relations section at www.investor.enersys.com. Additionally, the Company will conduct a conference call to discuss these results.

data.title: Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) to announce Q4 & full year 2025 results on Jan 22, 2026 after market close.
data.description: In a recent announcement, investment firm Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) revealed its plan to report the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on January 22, 2026. The report is scheduled to be released after the market closes on that day. Shareholders and interested individuals can access both the earnings release and the associated presentation for a comprehensive overview of the company's performance.

data.title: OneConstruction Group Limited (NASDAQ: ONEG) announces interim results for six months ended September 30, 2025.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, based in New York, OneConstruction Group Limited (NASDAQ: ONEG) announced important information about its company. OneConstruction Group Limited, a Cayman Islands company, operates through its subsidiary, OneConstruction Engineering Projects.

data.title: Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO) will report Q1 fiscal 2026 results on January 28, 2026, at 5:00pm Eastern Time. Webcast available at www.fico.com/investors.Character count: 142
data.description: Global analytics software leader FICO (NYSE: FICO) is set to reveal its performance for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 on January 28, 2026, post-market closure. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time (4:00 p.m. Central/2:00 p.m. Pacific), which will be webcasted on FICO’s website, www.fico.com/investors. A replay of the webcast will be accessible on the Event Calendar under Past Events until January 28, 2027.

data.title: Lumen Technologies to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 3, 2026 after market close. Earnings call at 5:00pm ET.
data.description: Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN), a leading network provider for AI services, will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 3, 2026, after the markets close. The earnings conference call will be broadcast live on the company’s Investor Relations website at 5:00 pm ET. Investors and analysts can access the company’s earnings release, investor presentation, and other related materials to gain insights into Lumen's performance in the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV) to release Q1 FY2026 earnings on Feb 3, 2026. Conference call on Feb 4, 2026 at 8:30 am EST.
data.description: BrightView Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BV) based in Blue Bell, Pa., is set to announce its first quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings after market close on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for the next day, Wednesday, February 4, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. EST. To participate, dial the conference telephone number: (800) 274-8461 for U.S. participants. International participants will have separate dial-in instructions.

data.title: EPR Properties (NYSE:EPR) announces monthly cash dividend for common shareholders, payable on 2/17/26 to those as of 1/30/26.
data.description: Kansas City, Missouri - EPR Properties (NYSE: EPR) announced that it will be distributing its monthly cash dividend on February 17, 2026, to shareholders who were on record as of January 30, 2026.

data.title: BXP sells properties for over $1 billion, meeting strategic asset sales plan outlined in September 2025.
data.description: Boston-based BXP, listed on NYSE as BXP, recently finalized property sales bringing in over $1.0 billion in net proceeds. This achievement aligns with their strategic asset sales plan for 2025-2027, first introduced at BXP’s Investor Day in September 2025. By the end of 2025, dispositions amounted to around $845 million. Additionally, two more sales were concluded in January. BXP holds the title as the largest developer, owner, and manager of top-tier workplaces in the US.

data.title: Universal Technical Institute, Inc. (NYSE: UTI) will host Q1 conference call on February 4, 2026, at 4:30pm ET.
data.description: A renowned workforce education institution, Universal Technical Institute, Inc. (NYSE: UTI), is scheduled to conduct a conference call on February 4, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EST. The call aims to review the company's financial and operational performance. This event is significant for stakeholders and investors interested in UTI’s progress and outcomes.

data.title: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 18 after market close, full year outlook included. Conference call to follow.
data.description: Phoenix-based Grand Canyon Education, Inc. (Nasdaq: LOPE) disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 and provide a forecast for the full year of 2026 on February 18, 2026, post market closure. An earnings call is scheduled to review the results and outlook.

data.title: Duke Energy Florida cutting storm cost recovery charge, lowering bills by $33 in Feb and $11 in March, totaling $44 reduction from Jan.
data.description: Starting in February, residential customers in St. Petersburg, Florida, will see a decrease of around $33 on their monthly bills. This reduction will further decrease by approximately $11 in March, resulting in a total decrease of $44 compared to January bills.

PRESIDENT TRUMP ORDERED THE COMMERCE DEPARTMENT AND THE U.S. TRADE REPRESENTATIVE TO NEGOTIATE AGREEMENTS WITH FOREIGN SUPPLIERS TO REDUCE U.S. RELIANCE ON IMPORTED PROCESSED CRITICAL MINERALS, CITING NATIONAL SECURITY RISKS.

data.title: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) to announce Q4 2025 earnings on February 5, 2026 after NYSE close, with conference call on February 6, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET. Call-in number: (888) 330-3576, passcode 7655497.
data.description: Chicago-based company Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) is set to release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, February 5, 2026. A conference call discussing these earnings is scheduled for Friday, February 6, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (9:00 a.m. Central Time). To join the call, dial (888) 330-3576 (or +1 (646) 960-0672 for international participants) with the passcode 7655497. Additionally, a live webcast will be available.

data.title: Viking wins top honors in USA TODAY 10BEST 2026 Readers' Choice Awards across multiple categories, including Best River Cruise Line and Best Ocean Cruise Line. Viking's ocean ships also recognized.
data.description: Viking®, a leading cruise line (NYSE: VIK), was recently recognized for its excellence in the USA TODAY 10BEST 2026 Readers’ Choice Awards. The company claimed the top spot in multiple categories, including Best River Cruise Line, Best Ocean Cruise Line, Best Alaska Cruise, and Best Cruise Line for Shore Excursions. Moreover, Viking's ocean vessels, the Viking Mars® and the Viking Star®, were singled out for their outstanding offerings, with the former winning Best Adults-Only Cruise and the latter named Best Cruise Ship for Dining. These accolades highlight Viking's commitment to delivering exceptional cruise experiences.

data.title: DHT Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DHT) issued a business update on January 14, 2026 from Hamilton, Bermuda.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on January 14, 2026, DHT Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DHT) shared a business update.

data.title: Mission Produce is acquiring Calavo Growers to expand North American avocado business, increasing supply from Mexico and California.
data.description: A recent transaction aims to strengthen Mission's presence in the North American avocado market by increasing its supply from both Mexico and California. This move is expected to significantly boost the company's position in the industry and ensure a more consistent avocado supply for consumers.

data.title: Group 1 Automotive (NYSE: GPI) will release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results; 254 dealerships in the U.S. and U.K.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Group 1 Automotive, Inc. (NYSE: GPI), a prominent Fortune 250 automotive retailer, disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year concluding on that date. Group 1 operates 254 dealerships across the United States and United Kingdom.

data.title: Nu Skin Enterprises to report Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb. 12 after market closes, with conference call at 5 p.m. ET.
data.description: Nu Skin Enterprises Inc. (NYSE: NUS) from Provo, Utah, revealed plans to unveil its fourth quarter and full year 2025 results on Thursday, Feb. 12, after the market closes. Following this, the Nu Skin management team will conduct a conference call for investors at 5 p.m. ET on the same day. This call will involve discussions on recent performance as well as upcoming business endeavors. The webcast of the call, which will include financial details, will also be accessible.
